verdict: An ideal entry-level retinol with gentle 0.2% concentration and protective antioxidants, validated by exceptionally high review volume (8500). Perfect first retinol with minimal irritation risk.

_research.name: The Ordinary Retinol 0.2% in Squalane
pros: Highest review count indicates proven tolerability
_research.con: Lower retinol strength means visible anti-aging results develop more gradually than higher concentrations.
